body: import org.evosuite.runtime.EvoRunnerParameters;
import org.junit.runner.RunWith;
import org.evosuite.runtime.EvoRunner;
import org.junit.Test;
import org.apache.commons.validator.routines.IBANValidator;
import static org.evosuite.runtime.EvoAssertions.*;
import static org.junit.Assert.*;

translation: assert str(e) == "Invalid country Code; must be exactly 2 upper-case characters"
assert str(e) == "Invalid country Code; must be exactly 2 upper-case characters"
assert "Invalid length parameter, must be in range 8 to 34 inclusive: 2978" in str(e)
assert "Invalid length parameter, must be in range 8 to 34 inclusive: -8" in str(e)
assert str(e) == "countryCode 'RO' does not agree with format: K'A<{ITI"
assert str(e.value) == "The singleton validator cannot be modified"
assert str(e) == "The singleton validator cannot be modified"
assert str(e) == "Invalid country Code; must be exactly 2 upper-case characters"
# countryCode 'FO' does not agree with format: DO
assert "Invalid country Code; must be exactly 2 upper-case characters" in str(e.value)
